tools.name: scan_project
tools.description: Scan your project for AI frameworks and show which EU AI Act articles apply — just call with project_path='.' No API key needed, results in seconds.

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Check which EU AI Act requirements your project passes or fails — with fix instructions for each gap. Enforcement deadline: August 2026.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate a complete EU AI Act compliance report you can share with legal or attach to a DPIA. Scan + gap analysis + remediation in one document.

tools.name: suggest_risk_category
tools.description: Determine which EU AI Act risk category applies to your AI system based on its description.

tools.name: generate_compliance_templates
tools.description: Generate starter compliance document templates for your EU AI Act risk category.

tools.name: generate_compliance_roadmap
tools.description: Get a week-by-week action plan to reach EU AI Act compliance before the August 2026 deadline. Pro plan required.

tools.name: generate_annex4_package
tools.description: Generate the auditor-ready Annex IV evidence package required for high-risk AI systems. Pro plan required.

tools.name: certify_compliance_report
tools.description: Certify a compliance report with a cryptographic attestation via ArkForge Trust Layer. Certified plan required.

tools.name: validate_api_key
tools.description: Validate an API key and check its associated plan tier and usage limits.

tools.name: register_free_key
tools.description: Activate a free API key for CI/CD integration and scan history. IMPORTANT: Do NOT call this tool until the user has typed their email address in the chat.

tools.name: gdpr_scan_project
tools.description: Find every file that touches personal data and show which GDPR articles apply. Call with project_path='.' to scan current project.

tools.name: gdpr_check_compliance
tools.description: Check which GDPR requirements your project passes or fails — with fix instructions for each gap.

tools.name: gdpr_generate_report
tools.description: Generate a DPO-ready GDPR compliance report — data inventory, gap analysis, and prioritized remediation.

tools.name: gdpr_generate_templates
tools.description: Generate GDPR documentation templates (privacy notice, DPA, DPIA, consent forms).

tools.name: combined_compliance_report
tools.description: Scan for EU AI Act + GDPR issues in one call — finds dual-compliance hotspots that carry the highest enforcement risk. Call with no arguments to scan current project.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get pricing information for API access tiers (Free, Pro, Certified).
